Author: LastOnionKnight
Name: GearGoblin
Description: BiS planner with acquisition tracking and materia advisor for FFXIV. Reads your gear, compares against an Etro/XIVGear BiS or a casual stat-priority preset, and tells you what to farm next, what to meld, and what not to bother melding.
Punchline: BiS planner with acquisition tracking and materia advisor.
